description: Hunter’s cover is nearly blown when Banks arrives and recognizes him at the ATCU, forcing him to act quickly. Bobbi needs Hunter’s help as ATCU agents close in, and Daisy manipulates the security system to impede pursuit. Bobbi and Hunter regroup but are confronted by Giyera, who reveals his Inhuman abilities and becomes a formidable obstacle.
location: ATCU headquarters / Advanced Threat Containment Unit facilities

transcript.line: Can't charm my way out of this one. Hunter, I'm gonna need you to get down here, and bring me my briefcase. Hunter?
